items.description: This project presents a trustworthy and explainable healthcare AI framework for early Alzheimer disease risk using machine learning, explainable AI, concept-aware reasoning, and Bayesian-inspired uncertainty estimation.  The system is designed as a clinical decision-support prototype capable of: - predicting Alzheimer risk

items.name: Project-ChurnGuard
items.description: "Project ChurnGuard is a strategic predictive analytics solution developed to mitigate customer attrition in a high-volume database of 11,260 active accounts. Facing a baseline 16.84% churn rate and to build a robust machine learning framework to transit business operation to proactive retention rather than reactive measures.

items.name: Hybrid_malware_detection_framework
items.description: AI-powered Hybrid Malware Detection Framework that combines static and dynamic analysis with machine learning to detect and classify malicious software. The system analyzes file behavior, API calls, and runtime activities to identify cyber threats with improved accuracy and reduced false positives.

items.name: pml

items.name: Live-Event-Intelligence-Commentary
items.description: 🚀Live, multi-source sports event intelligence platform engineered with distributed, low-latency architecture that delivers real-time AI-generated commentary, predictive analytics, and context-aware insights. It leverages advanced machine learning pipelines, natural language generation(NLG) and stream processing frameworks to provide dynamic play.

items.name: Credit-Risk-A-B-Test-Logistic-Regression-vs-LightGBM
items.description: An end-to-end machine learning A/B testing framework for credit default prediction - comparing a traditional Logistic Regression scorecard against a LightGBM gradient boosting model

items.name: tauro

items.description: Machine learning-based student dropout prediction framework comparing global (Kaggle) and local (Bangladesh) datasets. Includes feature engineering, SHAP-based explainability, ensemble models, and an early-warning system for academic interventions.

items.name: Interactive-Machine-Learning

This project demonstrates various active learning strategies and provides both programmatic and interactive interfaces for experimentation.

items.name: SMART-HUNTER
items.description: This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

items.name: ML-framework-for-SWF-retrieval

Covers end-to-end data preprocessing, EDA, and a full regression pipeline including model selection, feature engineering, HPO, SHAP explainability, and error analysis.
